summary: Prepare dataset for the specified date range (20 March 2025 to 21 March 2025); Apply sampling with rate 0.025 to generate the RNN training dataset

Review data_prep tool output for completeness; Identify missing parameters such as source_table, start_date, end_date, and transformation logic; Request clarification from analyst to complete the workflow configuration
Invoke data_prep to construct the dataset for the requested date range; Apply sampling rate 0.025 during preparation to produce the RNN training dataset

Review data_prep workflow template returned by the tool; Identify missing configuration required to generate the dataset; Request required parameters (source table, date column, label/feature schema, sampling method) before executing transformations
Extract runtime parameters from the user request (start_dt, end_dt, model, sample_rate); Call data_prep with the extracted parameters to generate the RNN training dataset
Confirm data_prep tool completed and parameters were accepted by the pipeline; Mark dataset preparation task as completed
